full_text: In the heart of New Degla, Maadi, VYON rises with elevated presence, just behind Breeze and Horizon of ClubTown, perfectly aligned with Wadi Degla Club. Only 20 minutes from New Cairo, Nasr City, Downtown, and Heliopolis. VYON offers proximity without pressure. This is a setting defined by contrast: :selected: N VYƠN Master Plan VYON DISCLAIMER: VYON YOUR LIFE IS ON === A fusion of View and On, VYON is not just named, it's composed. Born from vision, sculpted with precision, and shaped by elevation. It evokes a lifestyle defined by clarity, balance, and an open view of life. It's not just about where you live. It's about living with perspective. Space expands. Light flows. Every detail is deliberate. VYON doesn't rise above. It rises beyond and with it, your life is ON. VYON, the Vertical Language of Luxury === VYON is Wadi Degla Developments' most refined vertical expression, sculpted towers that embody lightness, serenity, and architectural finesse. This isn't height for prominence, but elevation reimagined. Sweeping views, layered geometry, and flowing interiors reshape the vertical living experience. From rooftop retreats to sky-high terraces, VYON offers a lifestyle above the city's rhythm - private, radiant, and rooted in ClubTown's experience. It rises with rare elegance and a presence designed to stand apart. Club Living is ON Born from a vision of elevated community life, VYON offers a seamless expression of club-connected living, seen through a distinctly refined lens. Here, Wadi Degla Club isn't a neighbor, it's an extension of home. Your mornings begin steps from movement and wellness. Weekends unfold in sync with the Club's rhythm. It's not just about proximity. It's a lifestyle shaped around balance, quiet privilege, and natural presence - composed, effortless, and entirely your own. Green living in ON === At VYON, luxury has a green heart. Layered into every level, it choreographs the flow of light, the movement of air, and the quiet settling of calm - from landscaped gardens that bathe spaces in daylight while preserving privacy, to deep balconies and vertical screens that diffuse the sun, cool interiors, and embrace refined, sustainable living. Above, verdant terraces and rooftop gardens extend the landscape toward the sky, cooling the air, softening bold architectural lines, and casting sunlight into a warm, gentle glow - transforming every view into a living masterpiece that enriches well-being and the art of life at home. Resilient Living is ON At VYON, resilience is built from the ground up where strength is silent, systems are seamless, and security is ever-present. Smart 24/7 security and discreet CCTV deliver peace of mind at every hour. Above all, daily life is supported by integrated waste management and expansive underground parking, offering comfort, continuity, and quiet confidence. This is enduring living - solid in structure, refined in experience, and built to last. # Wellness living is ON At VYON, wellness is a rhythm - rising across rooftops where movement, stillness, and space come into balance. Yoga decks, outdoor fitness zones, a rooftop mini gym, tranquil plunge pools, and a peaceful play yard are thoughtfully composed to energize, restore, and bring clarity - all framed by light, air, and uninterrupted calm. This is wellness in its most refined form - graceful, immersive, and seamlessly integrated into the art of living well. VYON YOUR LIFE IS ON SALES OFFICES SHERATON The District. Autostrade - Cairo Airport # MAADI Wadi Degla Sporting Club - 4th District, Zahraa Al Maadi # NEW CAIRO Wadi Degla Sporting Club - Lotus, New Cairo Wadi Degla Sporting Club - Al Tagmoa Al Awal Riverwalk Mall - New Cairo Neo Sales Center - Mostakbal City 19917
